# Dot parity dashboard

Differential survey of graphviz-ts vs the native `dot` oracle over the dot
test corpus. A report, not a gate (AD-1). Regenerate: `npx tsx
test/corpus/survey.ts && npx tsx test/corpus/dashboard.ts`.

## Summary

- **Oracle:** dot 15.1.0 · **corpus root:** `/Users/scottseely/git/graphviz/tests`
- **Surveyed (applicable):** 790
- **byte-match:** 496 (62.8%) · structural-match: 199 → 695/790 structurally equal (88.0%)
- **Accepted deltas (documented, won't-fix):** 4 · **Tracked gaps (unaccepted, will-fix):** 279 → of 283 non-byte-match graphs
- **errored:** 0 · **timeout:** 0 · **oracle-error:** 11 (excluded from scoring)
- **Quarantined (not surveyed, from corpus-manifest.json):** malformed 6, engine-deferred 6, multi-graph 3

Accepted deltas are deliberate, root-caused, won't-fix differences (`test/corpus/accepted-divergences.json` → [Known divergences](../../docs/known-divergences.md)). Everything else non-byte-match is a tracked gap we intend to close.

## Accepted deltas (4) — documented, not chased

Deliberate, root-caused differences we have chosen not to byte-match (a
portability constraint, sub-perceptual and bounded). Source of truth:
`test/corpus/accepted-divergences.json`; rationale in
[Known divergences](../../docs/known-divergences.md). These are excluded from
the diverged table and the backlog below.

| id | verdict | maxΔ | class | bound | ref |
|---|---|---:|---|---|---|
| `graphs-NaN` | structural-match | 18.00 | A2 | maxΔ~18pt; fine x only | known-divergences.md#a2-text-measurement-font-metrics-→-label-driven-layout |
| `share-NaN` | structural-match | 18.00 | A2 | maxΔ~18pt; fine x only | known-divergences.md#a2-text-measurement-font-metrics-→-label-driven-layout |
| `windows-NaN` | structural-match | 18.00 | A2 | maxΔ~18pt; fine x only | known-divergences.md#a2-text-measurement-font-metrics-→-label-driven-layout |
| `2368` | structural-match | 10.22 | A3 | maxΔ~10pt on one flat-edge arc (376->76); bbox/nodes/labels byte-match | known-divergences.md#a3-hypot-tie-break-in-spline-routing-dot |

## Tracked structural-match (195)

Same element tree; only numeric coordinate diffs above tolerance (no missing
or extra elements). Near-misses — sub-pixel-to-modest position drift — that we
intend to close (accepted structural-match deltas are listed above instead).

## Divergence backlog (next missions)

Named buckets over **tracked** (unaccepted) divergences, largest first. Each is
a candidate oracle-pinned fix mission.

### tracked diverged — by firstDiffPath shape

| bucket | count | examples | hypothesis |
|---|---:|---|---|
| `path-structure` | 64 | `1213-1`, `1213-2`, `1436` | edge path has a different command sequence or point count — spline routing structure |
| `element-count` | 15 | `1332`, `1367`, `1435` | missing/extra SVG elements — node, edge, cluster box, or arrowhead count differs |
| `attr-or-tag` | 2 | `graphs-b69`, `graphs-user_shapes` | element tag or a non-coordinate attribute differs |
| `compare-threw` | 1 | `1472` | compareSvg threw on the port SVG — malformed or partial output |
| `text-content` | 1 | `1879` | rendered text string differs — label content, escaping, or character encoding |
| `color-stroke` | 1 | `1949` | fill/stroke value differs — color resolution or default styling |
